title: Argentina 2026 World Cup Home Jersey
product_description:
Represent the reigning world champions with the Argentina 2026 World Cup Home Jersey. Crafted in the iconic sky blue and white vertical stripes, this jersey honors a nation whose passion for football runs deeper than any other. Worn by generations of legends, from Maradona to Messi, the albiceleste shirt is one of the most recognizable kits in the sport.

Built with advanced Dri-FIT ADV technology, the fabric wicks sweat away from the body and promotes airflow to keep you cool and dry whether you're in the stands or training pitch-side. The tailored fit moves with your body without restriction.

  • Official 2026 FIFA World Cup replica jersey
  • Dri-FIT moisture-wicking fabric
  • Sky blue and white vertical stripe design
  • Embroidered AFA crest on chest
  • Machine washable

  • KFA Taegeuk Warriors crest
  • Athletic modern fit

title: Spain 2026 World Cup Home Jersey
product_description:
Reigning European champions and perpetual World Cup favorites, Spain arrive at 2026 as one of the tournament's most anticipated sides. The Spain 2026 World Cup Home Jersey is a deep crimson red with gold accents, the same royal colors that fueled the historic back-to-back-to-back major tournament triumph between 2008 and 2012 and the reawakening of Spanish football's golden era.

Nike's Dri-FIT ADV precision-engineered fabric delivers the performance characteristics that Spain's possession-based tiki-taka style demands, lightweight, breathable, and flexible. The design features the intricate Spanish Royal coat of arms woven into the chest badge.

  • Official 2026 FIFA World Cup replica
  • Nike Dri-FIT ADV precision-engineered fabric
  • Deep crimson red with gold collar and cuff accents
  • RFEF Royal coat of arms crest
  • Slim performance fit

title: Switzerland 2026 World Cup Home Jersey
product_description:
Switzerland's Nati have become one of Europe's most consistent and hard-to-beat international sides, regularly advancing deep into major tournaments through tactical organization and technical quality. The Switzerland 2026 World Cup Home Jersey features the classic red design with the iconic white Swiss cross, clean, precise, and unmistakably Swiss.

Puma's dryCELL technology underlies this precision-crafted jersey, offering reliable moisture management and a comfortable fit for both performance and fan use. The cross motif extends into a subtle diagonal shoulder stripe, giving the classic design a modern athletic update.

  • Official 2026 FIFA World Cup replica
  • Puma dryCELL moisture management
  • Classic red with white Swiss cross design
  • Swiss Football Association crest
  • Regular fit

title: Trinidad and Tobago 2026 World Cup Home Jersey
product_description:
The Soca Warriors return to the World Cup carrying the spirit of a twin-island nation whose football history is larger than its geography. The Trinidad and Tobago 2026 World Cup Home Jersey features the national red, white, and black, colors that represent the fire and pride of Caribbean football, backed by one of the most passionate fanbases in the CONCACAF region.

Made with a lightweight breathable jersey fabric designed for tropical conditions, this shirt keeps supporters and players cool through long, intense match sessions. The design includes a vibrant bird of paradise graphic on the collar interior, celebrating T&T's natural biodiversity.

  • Official 2026 FIFA World Cup replica
  • Lightweight tropical-condition jersey fabric
  • Red, white, and black colorway
  • TTFA Soca Warriors crest
  • Regular fit

title: Ukraine 2026 World Cup Home Jersey
product_description:
Ukraine brings unbreakable resolve and deep pride to the 2026 World Cup. The Ukraine 2026 World Cup Home Jersey features the bold yellow and blue national colors, a design that carries enormous meaning for a nation and its people. Ukraine's presence on the world stage, both in football and beyond, is a statement of identity and resilience.

Joma's performance moisture-wicking technology is incorporated throughout the jersey, with quick-drying polyester and reinforced flat-lock stitching. The silhouette of Ukraine's geographic borders is printed in a faint watermark on the chest, a powerful and moving design choice.

  • Official 2026 FIFA World Cup replica
  • Joma performance moisture-wicking fabric
  • Bold yellow and blue national colors
  • UAF crest embroidery
  • Regular fit with geographic border watermark

title: Uruguay 2026 World Cup Home Jersey
product_description:
Two-time world champions and South America's most storied footballing nation relative to size, Uruguay bring the celestial blue to 2026 with a squad capable of shocking any opponent in the world. The Uruguay 2026 World Cup Home Jersey features the iconic sky blue, the celeste, that is one of international football's most historically significant colors.

Puma's dryCELL advanced performance fabric is used to construct this historic jersey, with a precision moisture management system and an athletic fit that honors Uruguay's tradition of physical, committed football. The sun of May badge is boldly embroidered on the chest.

  • Official 2026 FIFA World Cup replica
  • Puma dryCELL advanced performance fabric
  • Classic celeste blue with white accents
  • AUF sun of May crest embroidery
  • Athletic fit

title: USA 2026 World Cup Home Jersey
product_description:
The United States enters the 2026 World Cup as co-hosts, and with perhaps the most talented USMNT roster ever assembled. The USA 2026 World Cup Home Jersey is a statement piece, a bold, modern design in red, white, and blue that channels the confidence and ambition of a generation determined to leave their mark on the sport. For the first time in a generation, a deep World Cup run feels truly possible.

Nike's Dri-FIT ADV premium technology powers this flagship jersey, with a precision-cut body-mapped construction, laser-cut ventilation, and a performance-bonded collar. Bold American flag graphic elements are integrated throughout the design without overwhelming the clean athletic silhouette.

  • Official 2026 FIFA World Cup co-host home jersey
  • Nike Dri-FIT ADV premium body-mapped construction
  • Red, white, and blue with American flag graphic elements
  • US Soccer crest in premium embroidery
  • Limited co-host edition with laser-cut detail

title: Uzbekistan 2026 World Cup Home Jersey
product_description:
Uzbekistan makes their first-ever FIFA World Cup appearance in 2026, representing the hopes of Central Asia's most populous nation and a footballing program that has developed rapidly over the past decade. The Uzbekistan 2026 World Cup Home Jersey celebrates this historic debut in blue and white, with intricate design elements drawn from the region's extraordinary Islamic geometric art tradition.

Featuring a lightweight breathable polyester fabric with modern moisture management, the jersey is designed to handle the varied climate conditions encountered at the tournament. Suzani embroidery-inspired graphic patterning on the sleeve cuffs makes this one of the most culturally distinctive kits of the competition.

  • Official 2026 FIFA World Cup debut jersey
  • Lightweight breathable polyester moisture management
  • Blue and white with suzani-inspired graphic detailing
  • UFA crest on chest
  • Regular fit

title: Venezuela 2026 World Cup Home Jersey
product_description:
La Vinotinto announce themselves on the world stage for the first time in a full FIFA World Cup, representing a nation whose footballing passion has far outpaced its competitive results until now. The Venezuela 2026 World Cup Home Jersey features the distinctive burgundy-wine (vinotinto) color that gives the team its nickname, a shade unlike any other in international football.

Crafted with a performance polyester blend featuring targeted mesh ventilation at the back and sides, the jersey handles the tropical heat conditions Venezuela trains in. Gold star detailing along the cuffs and the arc of the collar celebrates Venezuela's place among football's emerging powers.

  • Official 2026 FIFA World Cup debut jersey
  • Performance polyester with mesh ventilation zones
  • Distinctive vinotinto (burgundy-wine) colorway
  • FVF crest with gold star detailing
  • Regular fit

title: Adidas Al Rihla Pro Official Match Ball
product_description:
The Adidas Al Rihla Pro Official Match Ball is the pinnacle of modern football technology, a 20-panel, perfectly spherical match ball designed for consistent flight, supreme touch, and official FIFA-approved performance. Built to FIFA Quality Pro specifications, this ball is used in the highest levels of professional play worldwide.

The Al Rihla features a butyl bladder for superior air retention and consistent pressure over time, ensuring it performs identically whether you're taking a free kick in training or in a sold-out stadium. The seamless polyurethane cover provides a responsive, predictable feel from every surface of the foot.

  • FIFA Quality Pro certified
  • 20-panel seamless polyurethane cover
  • Butyl bladder for superior air retention
  • Speed Shell technology for consistent flight trajectory
  • Machine-stitched construction
  • Size 5 official match size

title: Nike Flight Premier League Official Match Ball
product_description:
The Nike Flight Premier League Official Match Ball is engineered for precision and consistency at the highest level. The innovative Aerowsculpt technology, raised ridges on the ball's surface, disrupts airflow in a way that reduces unwanted knuckling and promotes true, predictable flight paths, making it the preferred choice of professional clubs across Europe.

A latex bladder provides soft, responsive feel for first touches and precise passing, while the premium textured casing offers excellent grip and control in all weather conditions. The design features the Premier League's iconic lion crest in a bold graphic treatment.

  • FIFA Quality Pro certified
  • Aerowsculpt technology for true flight
  • Latex bladder for responsive touch
  • All-weather textured polyurethane cover
  • 12-panel construction
  • Size 5 match size

title: Select Brillant Super FIFA Training Ball
product_description:
The Select Brillant Super FIFA Training Ball delivers professional-grade performance at a price point suited to regular training use. Select's Brillant Super has been a trusted choice of football clubs and academies worldwide for its durability, consistent shape retention, and reliable feel session after session.

Handstitched with Select's PU SuperSkin cover, the ball maintains its round shape even after thousands of touches, and the natural rubber bladder provides excellent pressure stability between training sessions. Approved for official amateur and youth competition play.

  • FIFA Inspected quality standard
  • Handstitched PU SuperSkin cover
  • Natural rubber bladder
  • 32-panel traditional construction
  • Excellent shape retention for training durability
  • Available in Size 5 and Size 4

title: Puma Orbita 6 MS Training Ball
product_description:
The Puma Orbita 6 MS Training Ball is the everyday workhorse for clubs, academies, and recreational players who demand reliable performance without the premium price tag. Built for repeated use on grass, turf, and indoor surfaces, the Orbita 6 maintains its shape and feel through hundreds of training sessions.

A machine-stitched TPU cover resists scuffs and surface wear, while the butyl rubber bladder ensures consistent air retention between inflations. The high-visibility colorway allows easy tracking during fast-paced drills and small-sided games.

  • Machine-stitched TPU cover
  • Butyl rubber bladder for air retention
  • Suitable for grass, turf, and indoor use
  • High-visibility color design
  • 32-panel traditional construction
  • Available in Sizes 3, 4, and 5

title: Uhlsport Infinity 290g Kids Lightweight Ball
product_description:
Designed specifically for young players aged 9 to 13, the Uhlsport Infinity 290g Kids Lightweight Ball weighs significantly less than a standard match ball, reducing the risk of injury and allowing developing players to practice heading, long passes, and strikes without strain. Youth development research consistently shows that appropriate ball weight accelerates skill development.

The soft-touch PVC cover is forgiving on contact and durable enough for daily use on grass or artificial surfaces. The bladder is a high-quality butyl construction for consistent pressure, and the bright colorway increases visibility for young players tracking the ball in motion.

  • Lightweight 290g construction for youth players
  • Soft-touch PVC cover reduces injury risk
  • Butyl bladder for consistent pressure
  • Age-appropriate for players 9 to 13
  • Suitable for grass and artificial surfaces
  • Size 4

title: Nike Dri-FIT Academy Training Shorts
product_description:
The Nike Dri-FIT Academy Training Shorts are the go-to choice for players and coaches who train daily and demand reliable, no-fuss performance gear. A staple in the kits of amateur clubs and professional academies alike, these shorts offer the essential combination of mobility, durability, and sweat management.

Built from 100% Nike Dri-FIT polyester, the fabric pulls moisture away from the skin and moves it to the surface for rapid evaporation. An elastic waistband with interior drawstring provides a secure, adjustable fit, while side pockets accommodate essentials during training sessions.

  • 100% Nike Dri-FIT polyester
  • Elastic waistband with drawstring
  • Side pockets
  • Standard 9-inch inseam
  • Available in multiple colorways
  • Machine washable

title: Adidas Tiro 23 League Woven Training Pants
product_description:
The Adidas Tiro 23 League Woven Training Pants have become one of the most popular training bottoms in the world for good reason, offering a professional look, excellent comfort, and practical features that suit everything from warm-up drills to casual training. The iconic Tiro silhouette includes tapered legs and signature three-stripe detailing.

Constructed from a lightweight woven polyester with AEROREADY lining, the pants keep you dry and fresh throughout training. Ankle zips allow easy removal over boots, and the elasticated waist with drawstring ensures a secure, customizable fit for all body types.

  • Lightweight woven polyester with AEROREADY lining
  • Tapered leg silhouette with ankle zips
  • Elasticated waist with drawstring
  • Side pockets and one zip back pocket
  • Iconic three-stripe detailing
  • Machine washable

title: Under Armour HeatGear Compression Tights
product_description:
Compression tights are an essential tool for the modern footballer, supporting muscle groups, improving circulation, and reducing recovery time. The Under Armour HeatGear Compression Tights are engineered for maximum muscle stabilization and comfort during intense training and match play in warm conditions.

The HeatGear ultra-light, ultra-smooth fabric delivers four-way stretch that moves in every direction without restricting natural movement. Anti-odor technology prevents the growth of odor-causing microbes, and the flat-lock seams eliminate chafing during long sessions. A wide, non-roll waistband stays in place even during the most dynamic movements.

  • HeatGear ultra-light four-way stretch fabric
  • Graduated compression for muscle support
  • Anti-odor technology
  • Flat-lock seams for chafe-free comfort
  • Non-roll waistband
  • Available in sizes XS through 3XL

title: Reusch Attrakt Starter Solid Goalkeeper Gloves
product_description:
The Reusch Attrakt Starter Solid Goalkeeper Gloves provide entry-to-intermediate-level goalkeepers with reliable grip, protection, and comfort at an accessible price point. Reusch has been outfitting professional and amateur goalkeepers for decades, and the Attrakt Starter brings that expertise to developing players.

Featuring a soft latex palm with Gripline technology, the gloves deliver exceptional grip in both wet and dry conditions. A negative cut construction keeps the glove close to the fingers for improved ball feel, while the strap closure ensures a secure, customizable fit around the wrist.

  • Soft latex Gripline palm for excellent wet and dry grip
  • Negative cut for improved ball feel
  • Strap wrist closure
  • 4mm latex foam backhand
  • Suitable for grass and turf surfaces
  • Sizes 6 through 11

title: Puma teamGOAL Training Jersey
product_description:
The Puma teamGOAL Training Jersey is the go-to training top for teams and individuals who want a clean, professional look on the training pitch without the premium price. Lightweight, durable, and available in a range of team-friendly colors, the teamGOAL jersey is a club kit staple worldwide.

Made from Puma's dryCELL performance fabric, the jersey wicks moisture effectively and dries quickly between sessions. The regular fit allows comfortable layering over compression shirts, and the ribbed crew collar provides a polished, finished look for training environments.

  • Puma dryCELL moisture-wicking fabric
  • Regular fit for comfortable layering
  • Ribbed crew collar
  • Contrast color panel detailing
  • Available in 8 colorways
  • Machine washable

title: Nike Dri-FIT Academy Crew Neck Sweatshirt
product_description:
The Nike Dri-FIT Academy Crew Neck Sweatshirt is the ideal transitional layer for pre-match warm-ups, post-training cool-downs, and cooler matchday conditions. A comfortable, clean design ensures it works as both a training piece and casual wear on travel days.

Constructed from a 60% cotton, 40% polyester Dri-FIT blend, the sweatshirt provides the warmth and softness of cotton with the moisture management of synthetic fiber. Flatlock seaming reduces bulk under training bibs or jackets, and the ribbed cuffs and hem ensure a snug, draught-free fit.

  • 60% cotton, 40% polyester Dri-FIT blend
  • Flatlock seaming for layering
  • Ribbed cuffs and hem
  • Classic crew neck design
  • Embroidered Nike Swoosh at chest
  • Available in sizes XS through 3XL

title: Adidas Tiro 23 Club Training Vest Bib
product_description:
An essential for any training session, the Adidas Tiro 23 Club Training Vest Bib provides clear team differentiation during scrimmages and drills without sacrificing comfort or breathability. The simple mesh construction allows full freedom of movement while layering easily over any training top or jersey.

Made from 100% recycled polyester mesh, each vest is made with at least 70% recycled materials as part of Adidas' commitment to sustainable performance. The open mesh design provides maximum airflow to keep players cool during high-intensity sessions.

  • 100% recycled polyester mesh
  • Open mesh for maximum ventilation
  • Loose fit for easy layering over any top
  • Available in 6 high-visibility colorways
  • One size fits most (S/M and L/XL available)
  • Machine washable

title: Nike Strike Elite Crew Football Socks
product_description:
The Nike Strike Elite Crew Football Socks are designed to provide the grip, cushioning, and support that modern footballers demand, engineered in partnership with professional players to address the specific demands of the sport during a 90-minute match.

Featuring a Dri-FIT blend with targeted cushioning zones at the toe, heel, and shin bone, the socks absorb impact and reduce fatigue during long sessions. A ribbed compression arch band supports the midfoot throughout play, and an anatomical design (left and right specific) ensures optimal fit in the boot.

  • Dri-FIT moisture-wicking blend
  • Targeted cushioning at toe, heel, and shin
  • Compression arch band support
  • Anatomical left and right construction
  • Crew length for shin guard compatibility
  • Sizes: Small (Shoe 3 to 5), Medium (6 to 8), Large (9 to 11), XL (12 and up)

title: Sells Wrap Pro Elite Goalkeeper Gloves
product_description:
The Sells Wrap Pro Elite Goalkeeper Gloves represent the top tier of goalkeeper hand protection, designed for advanced and professional-level goalkeepers who demand maximum grip, flexibility, and tactile feedback on every save. Sells is a specialist goalkeeper brand trusted by professionals worldwide.

The gloves feature an Aqua Supreme latex palm, one of the most grip-intensive latex compounds available, that performs exceptionally in both wet and dry conditions. The unique Wrap cut extends the latex down the finger sides for additional grip surface area, while pre-curved finger channels reduce hand fatigue during extended play.

  • Aqua Supreme latex palm for maximum grip
  • Wrap cut for extended lateral grip surface
  • Pre-curved finger channels for reduced fatigue
  • Supersoft foam backhand
  • 360-degree wrist strap for secure fit
  • Sizes 6 through 11

title: Nike Dri-FIT Park 20 Full-Zip Jacket
product_description:
The Nike Dri-FIT Park 20 Full-Zip Jacket is the go-to warm-up layer for players who need reliable protection from the cold without sacrificing range of motion. A staple across amateur and semi-professional clubs worldwide, the Park 20 offers a clean, athletic look that pairs seamlessly with any team kit.

The jacket is constructed from a Dri-FIT knit fabric that pulls moisture to the outer layer for rapid evaporation, keeping you dry and comfortable as your body temperature rises during warm-up drills. Ribbed cuffs and a hem drawcord allow a personalized, draught-free fit, while the full-length zip provides quick on-and-off access before and after play.

  • Nike Dri-FIT knit moisture management
  • Full-length zipper for easy on and off
  • Ribbed cuffs and adjustable hem drawcord
  • Side zip pockets for essentials
  • Available in 10 colorways for team customization
  • Machine washable, tumble dry low
